_description: Modern documentary target implemented via render_v2.py: grain overlay 15% screen-blend, kinetic ASS text on dates/numbers/iconic words, music bed ducked -18dB under narration, whoosh SFX at chapter cuts, reveal sting at ch5 answer. Consumes assets_packs/ library (Freesound + Pexels + Pixabay + ElevenLabs). PROMOTED to default 2026-07-03 after v1_ken_burns visual plateau observed. Motion graphics via Remotion + Manim + AI B-roll (Veo/Kling) are next iter — not required here.
notes: First variant to actually contest Fern/LEMMiNO polish. Requires api_keys.json + Freesound token + optional fal.ai key.
